landing.subtitle: Take the free readiness test, see exactly where you stand, and let your AI coach explain every mistake until you're test-ready.
landing.ctaNote: No download. No sign-up needed to try. Takes about 5 minutes.
landing.step1Body: Scan the QR code or tap the button and take a quick readiness test — anonymously.
landing.step2Body: Get a clear score per topic: road signs, rules, and vehicle controls.
landing.step3Body: Unlock 90 days of full practice and AI explanations that target your weak areas.
landing.pricingBody: Everything unlocked for the full prep window. Then just R20/month if you want to keep the AI Coach — cancel anytime.
landing.trustParentBody: A readiness score parents actually understand.

readiness.title: Your free K53 readiness check
readiness.intro: A quick {count}-question test across road signs, rules of the road, and vehicle controls. You'll get a clear readiness score you can show a parent.
readiness.benefitAnon: Anonymous — nothing is saved or shared
readiness.benefitTopics: See exactly which topics need work
readiness.agree: By starting you agree to our

result.msgNotReady: There's work to do — but now you know exactly where. Your AI coach can close these gaps fast.
result.msgAlmostReady: You're close! A focused push on your weak areas should get you test-ready.
result.msgTestReady: Great work — you're tracking well. Keep practising to lock it in.
result.ctaBody: Unlock 90 days of full practice + AI explanations for R179.
result.share: Share my score with a parent
result.shareText: My K53 readiness score is {percent}% ({band}). Check yours free:
result.shareCopied: Copied — paste it to your parent on WhatsApp.
result.noResult: No readiness result yet. Take the free test to see your score.

auth.title: Log in or sign up
auth.subtitle: One account per learner. Parents pay; learners practise.
auth.passkeyToast: Passkey sign-in arrives with Supabase WebAuthn. Your device handles Face ID / fingerprint — we never store biometrics.
auth.magicSent: Check your email for a magic link.
auth.demoSkip: Demo mode — Supabase not configured. Skipping to the app.
auth.demoNote: Demo mode: Supabase isn't configured yet, so login is simulated. Add keys in .env.local to enable real auth.
auth.minor: Under 18? A parent or guardian must approve saving your progress.

paywall.title: Unlock 90 days of full access
paywall.subtitle: One payment. No subscription trap. Optional R20/month afterwards only if you want to keep the AI Coach.
paywall.incl3: AI explanations for every wrong answer
paywall.note: Secure South African payment gateways. This is a parent-facing screen.
paywall.stub: {gateway} checkout is stubbed in the MVP scaffold.

dashboard.welcomeSub: Keep going — small daily sessions beat cramming.
dashboard.readinessBody: You're almost ready. Your weakest topic is Rules.
dashboard.roadSignsSub: Practice the signs you'll be tested on

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Three topics make up the K53 learner's test.

progressPage.title: Your progress
progressPage.note: Readiness blends mock average, topic accuracy, weak-area improvement and consistency (DB9). Shown here with sample data.

module.signsSubtitle: Tap a sign to learn what it means, what to do, and the common mistake.
module.rulesSubtitle: The rules examiners test most — what to do, and the common mistake.
module.controlsSubtitle: What each control does, how to use it, and the common mistake.
module.contentSoon: Learner content for this sign is being prepared.

practice.completeKeep: Good practice. Review the ones you missed and try again.

comingSoon.mockBlurb: Full timed mock exams from the question bank land once the content library is populated. The free readiness test already gives you a score today.

legal.title: Privacy & POPIA
legal.intro: Placeholder notice for the MVP scaffold. The production policy is drafted with legal review before launch (DB12).
legal.p1: The free readiness test is anonymous — no account required.
legal.p2: We never collect or store biometric data. Passkey sign-in is handled by your own device.
legal.p3: For learners under 18, a parent or guardian must consent before we save personal progress.
legal.p4: We collect the minimum personal information needed.
legal.p5: Production data is handled POPIA-first: SA data residency, clear retention rules, and encrypted storage.
legal.docs: Required production documents: Terms, Privacy Policy, POPIA Policy, Parent Consent, Refund Policy, School Agreement, Cookie Policy, AI Usage Disclaimer.
